texto: Ego said, 'treat me like a game and I will show you how it's played'; Soul replied, 'ego can never lose; it is always a winner because ego is playing against itself [ego is me; soul is we]'.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sandeep N. Tripathi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Ego said, 'treat me like a game and I will show you how it's played'; Soul replied, 'ego can neve…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, ego, games pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de games e loser.

texto: In life, growth is imminent. And, growth without change, is unthinkable. And, to make the unthinkable thinkable, new roads need to be carved out by way of old ones. The old stands tall and firm and befriends the new to fall into place, with refined maturity and greater understanding and cultured admiration. It's simply pure Magic.
